name: SImon.sidmassgrowthwat
title: Sea-Ice Mass Change Through Growth in Supercooled Open Water (Frazil)
description: Rate of change of sea-ice mass due to sea ice formation in supercooled water (often through frazil formation) divided by grid-cell area. Always positive or zero.
processing note: CHANGE SINCE CMIP6 in Cell Methods - CMIP6:area: mean where sea time: mean CMIP7:area: mean where sea\_ice over all_\__area\_types time: mean	,
